    Summary Description
    1679

    AI summary generator

    Alto AI will generate a summary based on details specified in the property tab.

    • Add additional details to create a more customised summary
    • Use the button to generate a summary
    • Edit and save the summary as normal

    Additional details (optional):

    The summary generated is provided as a guide only, please ensure you have checked its accuracy before publishing. Alto takes no responsibility for incorrect info produced.

    We've released a new and upgraded workflow to save you time and simplify the steps needed to prepare a property for marketing. This page will in future redirect to this new Media experience.     Property Search Examples

    Mix of Property & Vendor/Landlord RECOMMENDED

    Examples: "Smith Mill 76", "Redbrick Susan", "Martlets Emma", "Brown 42"

    Just Property Addresses

    Examples: "Mill Lane", "Oakfields", "NW1", "45 Bear Street"

    Just Vendor/Landlord Names

    Examples: "Emma", "David Jones", "Mr Smith"

    Start narrow, then go broad

    Examples: Try "123 London" instead of "London Road" or "Green Lane NW1" instead of "Green Lane"

    Use quotation marks

    Examples: "Stafford Road" (including quotes) for only that road or "Mark West" just for that name.

    Other Ways

    You can also search using postcodes, your assigned reference code if you use them or the Alto Property Id.

    Examples: "NW1 1AB", "MYREF0078", "12345678"
